overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a scenic coastal highway in a video game environment. The camera moves along the road shoulder with the ocean visible to the left and a rocky mountainside to the right, passing various vehicles including cars, trucks, and motorcycles. The scene features clear sunny weather with bright natural lighting, power lines running parallel to the road, and concludes with a view over the guardrail to a sandy beach and rocky islands below.

events.description: white sedan passes by in the right lane
large truck with trailer overtakes in the right lane

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder, maintaining a consistent pace with the ocean visible to the left

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving past in the right lane
large commercial truck with trailer approaching and passing by

entered.detail: asphalt multi-lane road with white lane markings and cracked surface texture
deep blue sea visible beyond the roadside cliff edge
rocky hillside with sparse vegetation rising steeply beside the road
metal safety barrier with concrete base separating road from steep drop
wooden utility poles with multiple cross-arms and power lines running parallel to the road
tall evergreen trees lining the ocean side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person walk along a sunny coastal highway. The road stretches ahead with the ocean visible to the left and a rocky mountainside to the right. Vehicles including a white sedan and a large truck pass by in the right lane as the camera maintains a steady walking pace along the shoulder.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving coastal highway with rocky cliff face

events.description: motorcycle speeds past in the right lane
road curves gently to the left as the highway follows the coastline
blue sports car overtakes slower traffic in the right lane

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder as the road curves leftward, navigating the bend while traffic passes

notable_agents.action: motorcycle speeding past quickly in the right lane
blue sports car overtaking other vehicles at high speed

entered.detail: exposed brown rock formation on the mountainside becoming more prominent as the road curves

segments.scene_description: The highway continues with increased traffic density as the road curves gently to the left. The rocky cliff face on the right becomes more prominent, while various vehicles including a motorcycle and a blue sports car pass by. The power poles recede behind as the walk continues along the curving asphalt.

events.description: camera turns sharply left to look over the guardrail at the beach and ocean below
camera turns back to face forward along the highway and resumes walking

agents.ego_description: pausing the forward walk to look over the guardrail at the scenic beach and rocky islands below, then turning back to resume the journey

entered.detail: sandy cove with light-colored sand visible below the cliff edge, lapped by calm blue water
small rocky outcroppings and islets scattered in the ocean water beyond the beach

segments.scene_description: The camera turns sharply left to look over the guardrail, revealing a stunning view of a sandy beach and rocky islands in the bright blue ocean below. After observing the coastal scenery, the camera turns back to face forward along the highway, where the road continues ahead with the ocean still visible to the left and the journey resumes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a sunny coastal highway that transitions from a steady trek past traffic to a panoramic overlook of the ocean. It begins on a straight stretch of road with the ocean to the left and a rocky mountainside to the right, as a white sedan and a large truck pass by in the adjacent lane. As the road curves gently to the left, the rocky cliff face becomes more prominent and traffic increases with a motorcycle and a blue sports car speeding past. The camera then turns sharply left to look over the guardrail, revealing a stunning view of a sandy beach and rocky islands set against the bright blue water below. Finally, the perspective shifts back toward the horizon to resume the journey forward along the asphalt with the ocean still visible to the left.
